overall.description: A first-person walk through a dystopian urban environment at night, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves through a narrow trash-strewn alley, passes through an underpass with vehicles, transitions through a covered pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements, and continues along a street beneath an elevated highway with industrial backdrops. The scene is dominated by warm orange sodium lighting mixed with red neon accents and atmospheric haze.

events.description: approaching a directional road sign with yellow arrow symbol

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow enclosed alley with high concrete walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall concrete walls lining the left side of the narrow street
piles of garbage bags and debris accumulated on the right sidewalk
tall street lamp emitting warm orange light
road sign with yellow arrow indicating direction

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow urban canyon with high concrete walls and trash piles illuminated by sodium street lamps. The camera walks forward through the enclosed alley, approaching a directional road sign and the entrance to an underpass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass with vehicle traffic passing through

events.description: white sedan vehicle passes by on the left side of the road
dark SUV passes by in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the underpass as vehicles pass by on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the underpass, passing the camera

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls of the underpass tunnel
concrete bridge deck forming the roof of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a concrete underpass where the enclosed walls block the sky completely. Vehicles including a white sedan and SUV pass through the tunnel while the camera continues walking forward toward the distant exit light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with neon advertisements

events.description: turning right into a covered pedestrian area beneath the elevated highway
passing bright red neon advertisement screens illuminating the area

agents.ego_description: turning right into a covered walkway and continuing forward beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway
illuminated billboard with red and white graphics advertising products
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the camera turns right into a covered pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway. Large concrete pillars line the path while bright neon advertisement screens cast red light onto the concrete tiles. The area is sheltered from weather with metal beams visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under elevated highway with industrial district backdrop

events.description: exiting the covered walkway back to the open street under the elevated highway
multiple vehicles including a truck and sedan pass by on the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway with industrial buildings visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the road under the elevated highway

entered.detail: steel framework and concrete deck of the overhead highway structure
metal chain-link fence running parallel to the road
tall industrial towers and silos visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway onto a street running beneath the elevated highway. Industrial silos and towers loom in the hazy background while vehicles pass on the road. Chain-link fences and concrete barriers line the street, with the massive highway girders overhead casting shadows on the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic urban canyon that gradually opens into a vast industrial streetscape. It begins by walking through a narrow alleyway flanked by high concrete walls and trash piles under the glow of sodium lamps, moving steadily toward a directional road sign. As the camera enters a concrete underpass, the sky vanishes completely and the view is momentarily shared with passing vehicles before the path leads toward a distant exit light. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right into a covered pedestrian walkway, where massive concrete pillars and overhead metal beams are bathed in the red glow of neon advertisement screens. Finally, the camera exits the shelter onto a street beneath an elevated highway, where the environment expands to reveal towering industrial silos and hazy horizons framed by heavy girders and chain-link fences.
